basic_details.organization_name: Andhra Pradesh Medical Services Recruitment Board (APMSRB)
basic_details.post_name: Entomologist, Data Scientist, Data Engineer, Monitoring & Evaluation Manager-Data Analytics & Informatics, Programme Management Unit (Support Staff)

age_limit.age_details: OC: 42 years, EWS/SC/ST/BC: 47 years, Ex-servicemen: 50 years, Differently Abled: 52 years as on date of notification
age_limit.details: All Posts: OC: 42 years, EWS/SC/ST/BC: 47 years, Ex-servicemen: 50 years, Differently Abled: 52 years as on date of notification.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc/Ph.D Entomology (Vector Biology), M.Sc, PhD in Data Science / M. Tech in Data Science/ Executive PG in Data Science & AI from IIT, B. Tech/M. Tech (CS/IT), Master’s degree in Social work (MSW) / Statistics / Mathematics / Data Analytics / Public Informatics, Postgraduate (MSW/IT/CS/Health/Admin/Management)
qualification.details: Entomologist: M.Sc/Ph.D Entomology (Vector Biology). Expertise required in Vector Surveillance Analytics, Climate Linkage Modeling and Entomological Risk Mapping. Data Scientist: M.Sc, PhD in Data Science / M. Tech in Data Science/ Executive PG in Data Science & AI from IIT. Expertise required in ML Algorithms, Forecasting Models, API Integration and Real-time Analytics. Minimum 3 years of work experience in Public Health using ML Algorithms. Data Engineer: B. Tech/M. Tech (CS/IT). Expertise required in Data Pipeline Development, ETL Processes, Data Lake Architecture and System Integration. Data Governance, Security Compliance and Backup Management. Minimum 3 years of work Experience in ETL and data lake Architecture. Monitoring & Evaluation Manager – Data Analytics & Informatics: Master’s degree in Social work (MSW) / Statistics / Mathematics / Data Analytics / Public Informatics. Minimum 5 years of experience in Public Health Data Analytics. Programme Management Unit (Support Staff): Postgraduate (MSW/IT/CS/Health/Admin/Management). Expertise required in Documentation, Logistics, Procurement Support, Monitoring Dashboards and Coordination. Minimum 3 years of work experience in Public Health.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Monitoring & Evaluation Manager – Data Analytics & Informatics

selection_process: Merit and Rule of Reservation Qualifying Examination (80 Marks) Technical Interview (20 Marks)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the APMSRB Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of APMSRB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the APMSRB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the APMSRB Recruitment 2026 is 30-06-2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this APMSRB recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 8 vacancies are available for the posts of Entomologist, Data Scientist, Data Engineer, Monitoring & Evaluation Manager-Data Analytics & Informatics, and Programme Management Unit (Support Staff).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC category candidates is Rs. 2000/-. For SC/ST candidates, the fee is Rs. 1800/-.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Data Scientist post?
faq.answer: For the Data Scientist post, candidates must have an M.Sc, PhD in Data Science / M. Tech in Data Science/ Executive PG in Data Science & AI from IIT, with at least 3 years of work experience in Public Health using ML Algorithms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for the Programme Management Unit (Support Staff) position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Programme Management Unit (Support Staff) position is Rs. 1,00,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these APMSRB posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Merit and Rule of Reservation, followed by a Qualifying Examination (80 Marks) and a Technical Interview (20 Marks).

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is age relaxation. OC candidates can apply up to 42 years, EWS/SC/ST/BC up to 47 years, Ex-servicemen up to 50 years, and Differently Abled candidates up to 52 years as on the date of notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for APMSRB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website of APMSRB to fill out and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for APMSRB recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for APMSRB recruitment is https://apmsrb.ap.gov.in/msrb.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contract basis.
